location.office_time_required: optional in-office for NYC and SF Bay Area employees

level_signals: 2-3+ years of relevant product management experience
Comp range $150K-$220K base suggests mid-to-senior IC
Owns a large portion of core product roadmap
Previous engineering and/or tech lead experience expected

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 2-3+ years of relevant product management experience or previous AI/ML experience with strong product ownership.
Previous engineering and/or tech lead experience
Strong track record of building in a technical domain while shipping quickly and efficiently.
Willingness to get your hands dirty with code!
Experience and/or knowledge of working within machine learning, or data platforms and infrastructure.
Experience working directly with customers and promoting community discussions in order to gather client feedback.
Experience driving data-informed product strategy into production.
Utilize your understanding in AI/ML/CV or related technical space in order to contribute to Arize AI's main product offering.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience working with Figma or similar design tools

scope.surface: Arize AI core product roadmap — AI observability, evaluation, and agent engineering platform
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, Series C, enterprise and Fortune 500 customers
primary_metrics_inferred: Product adoption and usage by enterprise customers
Competitive positioning in AI observability market
core_responsibilities: Owning, strategizing, and developing a large portion of Arize AI's core product roadmap
Involvement in all stages of the product life cycle from ideation to creation
Engaging with customers directly to gather meaningful insight and feedback
Working cross functionally with engineering, design, marketing, and sales
Communicating and integrating competitive analysis, usability research, and market analysis into product requirements
Contributing to Arize AI's main product offering using AI/ML/CV technical understanding

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($150K-$220K base) plus equity
Remote-first company with optional in-office in NYC and SF Bay Area
WFH monthly stipend for remote employees
Series C company with $135M+ funding and 150+ enterprise customers — strong market traction
Clear product surface in a high-growth category (AI observability)
Comprehensive benefits including unlimited PTO and generous parental leave
Team has deep technical backgrounds from top AI/ML companies (Uber, Cruise, Spotify, Apple)
red_flags: No visa sponsorship or work authorization information stated
Broad comp range ($150K-$220K) makes seniority level and leveling expectations unclear
2-3+ years minimum is low but combined with 'engineering/tech lead' requirement raises the actual bar ambiguously
No clarity on team size or direct reporting structure

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and responsibilities)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and customer profiles)
ambiguities: Years of experience stated as '2-3+ years' — the '+' after '3' implies potentially more years required; treated as minimum 2 years with soft upper bound noted
Role could be mid-level or senior depending on how 'large portion of core product roadmap' ownership is interpreted alongside '2-3+ years' minimum
Remote-first language suggests remote-us eligible but does not explicitly confirm US-only; treated as remote-us given domestic office references and no international mentions
